description_long: This is a large, commercial-style espresso coffee machine with a robust, rectangular body featuring a combination of dark metallic and deep reddish-brown panels. The front face displays multiple group heads, portafilters, and two steam wands, along with a metallic drip tray and a control panel with buttons and indicator lights. The sides are curved and solid, with the rear panel being a flat, glossy reddish-brown surface. The machine sits on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the surface. A gold-colored emblem or badge is visible on the front, adding a touch of branding or decoration. The overall design suggests durability and high capacity, suitable for use in cafes or busy urban environments.
description: A large, commercial espresso coffee machine with a metallic and reddish-brown body, multiple group heads, steam wands, and a control panel. It features a robust, professional design with a gold emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, group heads, portafilters, steam wands, drip tray, and a gold emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved side panel and the depth of the machine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, glossy reddish-brown panel with no visible controls or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the curved side panel and the machine's depth.
attribute_brand_logo: A gold-colored emblem is visible on the front panel, but the brand name is not clearly readable.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel features several round buttons and indicator lights arranged horizontally above the group heads, with two larger dials or knobs on the lower left.
